presentation.title: Program Coach Deck 02 — Opportunity Analysis Workshop

slides.title: Opportunity Analysis Protocol
slides.body: Map market, problem, demand, impact, and income for your validated segment.
slides.speakerNotes: Squads use Week 2 evidence — not new assumptions.

slides.title: Stakeholder Sort
slides.body: Who solves what? Where is the advisor's unique role?
slides.speakerNotes: Gallery walk or card sort. Compare teacher, bank, government, insurer, planner, advisor.

slides.title: Entrepreneur Lens Worksheet
slides.body: Five lenses: market · problem · demand · impact · income.
slides.speakerNotes: Each squad completes for their target segment.

slides.title: Platform Stack Exercise
slides.body: YOU → Skills → AIA Platform → Clients → Income → Business → Leadership → Enterprise
slides.speakerNotes: Participants personalize the stack with their name and Week 1 ambition.

slides.title: Day 11 Deliverables
slides.body: Opportunity analysis memo + platform stack diagram uploaded to portfolio.
slides.speakerNotes: Preview Day 12: FNA as your first business tool.
